---
title: "Differential Expression Across Immune Subpopulations"
subtitle: "Pseudobulk DESeq2 — Aducanumab vs IgG"
code-fold: true
date: last-modified
embed-resources: true
format: html
---

```{r setup}
#| message: false
library(qs2)
library(Seurat)
library(purrr)
library(DESeq2)
library(patchwork)
library(gridExtra)
source("20260217-helper_functions.R")
```

```{r load-data}
immune <- qs_read("seurat_objects/20260217_Part2_immune.qs2")
```

```{r prepare}
immune$annotated_subclusters <- gsub(" ", ".", immune$annotated_subclusters)
DefaultAssay(immune) <- "Xenium"
```

```{r pseudobulk-de}
#| results: asis
#| fig.width: 14
#| fig.height: 6
#| warning: false

subclusters <- unique(immune$annotated_subclusters)

de_results <- map(subclusters, \(subpop) {
  # subset to current cell type
  sub_obj <- subset(immune, annotated_subclusters == subpop) 
  # pseudobulk: sum counts per sample
  bulk <- AggregateExpression(sub_obj, 
                              group.by = "sample_ID",
                              return.seurat = TRUE)

  sample_meta <- sub_obj@meta.data |>
    dplyr::distinct(sample_ID, Treatment.Group) |>
     # AggregateExpression converts _ to -
    dplyr::mutate(bulk_id = gsub("_", "-", sample_ID))
  bulk$Treatment.Group <- sample_meta$Treatment.Group[
    # map treatment to pseudobulk samples
    match(colnames(bulk), sample_meta$bulk_id) 
  ]
  Idents(bulk) <- "Treatment.Group"

  # DESeq2 on pseudobulk counts (3 Adu vs 3 IgG)
  res <- anayet(bulk, 
                ident1 = "Adu",
                ident2 = "IgG",
                test_method = "DESeq2",
                min_pct = 0,
                plot_title = paste("Differentially expressed genes in", subpop),
                print_plot = FALSE)
  # QMD section header per cell type
  cat("\n\n##", subpop, "\n\n") 

  if (nrow(res$significant_results) > 0) { # format significant DEGs as table grob
    sig <- res$significant_results |>
      dplyr::select(p_val, avg_log2FC, p_val_adj) |>
      dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(where(is.numeric), \(x) signif(x, 3))) |>
      dplyr::arrange(p_val_adj)
    table_grob <- tableGrob(sig, theme = ttheme_minimal(base_size = 20))
  } else {
    table_grob <- tableGrob(data.frame(Result = "No significant DEGs"),
                            theme = ttheme_minimal(base_size = 22))
  }

  combined <- res$volcano_plot + wrap_elements(table_grob) + # patchwork side-by-side
    plot_layout(widths = c(2,5)) 
  print(combined)

  res
}) |> set_names(subclusters)
```
